settings.text:
Order Processing:
All orders are processed and shipped during regular business hours (Monday through Friday, excluding major holidays). Please allow 1-2 business days for your order to be processed before it ships.

Shipping Rates & Estimates:
• Standard Shipping (3-5 business days) - Free on orders over ₹1500.
• Expedited Shipping (1-2 business days) - Variable rate based on location at checkout.

Order Tracking:
You will receive a shipment confirmation email containing your tracking number(s) once your order has shipped.

We stand behind our products with a 30-Day Glow Guarantee. If you are not entirely satisfied with your Elvara Skin purchase, we're here to help.

Eligibility for Returns:
• Products must be returned within 30 days of the original purchase date.
• Products must be at least half full to be eligible for a refund.

How to Initiate a Return:
Please contact our concierge team at support@elvaraskin.com with your order number to receive a pre-paid return label.

Refunds:
Once we receive your returned item, we will process your refund to the original method of payment. Please allow 5-7 business days for the refund to appear on your statement.
